description: You are a healthcare facilities manager for Lakewood Family Medicine, a newly established primary care clinic. The building shell has already been drafted in Sweet Home 3D. Furnish and lay out the clinic interior for a construction contractor review using the built-in furniture catalog. The clinic must include: a patient waiting area with seating for at least 20 people and a reception counter; at least two examination rooms, each containing an exam table, a physician chair, and a patient chair; a nurse workstation with a desk; and a restroom accessible from the waiting area. Save the completed layout to /home/ga/Documents/clinic_layout.sh3d.
